programme.title: BKFC Fight Night - Michigan: Rodriguez vs. Cavender
programme.desc: Esteban Rodriguez vs. Zac Cavender. From Mount Pleasant, Mich.

programme.desc: Houston Alexander vs. Jeremy Smith, cruiserweights; Dakota Cochrane vs. Noah Cutter, middleweights; Brandon Meyer vs. Sean Wilson. From Liberty First Arena in Omaha, Neb.

programme.desc: From April 26, 2025, at Melrose Ballroom in Queens, N.Y.

programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.desc: Rosen Dimitrov vs. Todor Zhelyazkov, middleweight; Georgi Valentinov vs. Bojan Kosendar, middleweight. From Arena Sofia in Sofia, Bulgaria. From Nov. 17, 2023.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show
programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Cheick Kongo takes on Sergei Kharitonov in the main event from Sioux Falls, S.D., Aug. 8, 2021.

programme.desc: From Feb. 24, 2023. Features Alan Belcher vs. Arnold Adams for BKFC heavyweight championship, plus James Lilley vs. Bobby Taylor in bare-knuckle boxing action from Kenner, La.

programme.title: BKFC 39
programme.desc: March 24, 2023. Features Reggie Barnett Jr. defending BKFC bantamweight title against Daniel Alvarez, plus Britain Hart vs. Jenny Clausius for BKFC women's strawweight title from Norfolk, Virginia.

programme.desc: Championship between Usman Nurmagomedov and Alexandr Shabliy headlines the event.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck
programme.sub-title: What If Feeling Small Is Good For You?
programme.desc: Follow the Tahoe Lab research team as they share unprecedented results on how 2 minutes of awe affects us all.
